title: バスケ
cond: Enter [[Yume 2kki:French Street|French Street]].

title: 青い鏡、赤い鏡
cond: Enter the blue mirror and the red mirror in the Green Tile Room in [[Yume 2kki:Dojo|Dojo]].

title: うろつき_RT
cond: Get the [[Yume 2kki:Effects#Chainsaw|Chainsaw]] effect.

title: 好奇心は猿をも
cond: Encounter the creature with bell-like organs in the basement of [[Yume 2kki:Monkey Mansion|Monkey Mansion]].

title: 黒魚と人魚
cond: Visit the mermaid in [[Yume 2kki:Pleasure Street|Pleasure Street]].

title: まるい
cond: Obtain Wallpaper #71, get the [[Yume 2kki:Effects#Child|Child]] and [[Yume 2kki:Effects#Invisible|Invisible]] effects, and visit [[Yume 2kki:Eyeball Archives|Eyeball Archives]], [[Yume 2kki:Shop Ruins|Shop Ruins]], all sections of [[Yume 2kki:Dream Park|Dream Park]], [[Yume 2kki:Nazca Valley#Red and Green Stone|Nazca Valley]] "'''Stove'''" area, [[Yume 2kki:Kaleidoscope World|Kaleidoscope World]], [[Yume 2kki:Ornamental Plains|Ornamental Plains]] and [[Yume 2kki:Knife World|Knife World]].

title: 魔女っ娘キャット
cond: Enter [[Yume 2kki:Witch Heaven|Witch Heaven]].

title: わたしのなまえ
cond: Spell "Urotsuki" in the [[Yume 2kki:Spelling Room|Spelling Room]].

title: 避けられた墓地裏
cond: Visit the grave in [[Yume 2kki:Shunned Street|Shunned Street]].

title: ツギハギパッチ
cond: Visit the '''Fabric Planet''' in [[Yume 2kki:Moonview Lane#Fabric Planet|Moonview Lane]] and transform into Tsugihagi-kun in the '''Patchwork Playroom''' of the [[Yume 2kki:Pansy Path#Patchwork Playroom|Pansy Path]].

title: KING
cond: Obtain the [[Yume 2kki:Effects#Child|Child]] effect and enter [[Yume 2kki:Shogi Board|Shogi Board]].

title: 黒魔女さん
cond: Chainsaw the sane [[Yume 2kki:Chasers#Shadow Lady|Shadow Lady]] in [[Yume 2kki:Forest World|Forest World]], then go underground and emerge.

title: それぞれの世界
cond: Go through all of the [[Yume 2kki:Nexus|Nexus]] portals.

title: GB Urotsuki
cond: Enter [[Yume 2kki:Monochrome GB World#GB Well|GB Well]].

title: 電信柱
cond: Enter [[Yume 2kki:Domino Constructions|Domino Constructions]].

title: また行くの？
cond: Interact with [[Yume 2kki:Megusuri Uri|Megusuri Uri]] outside his shop in [[Yume 2kki:Visine World|Visine World]].

title: ほねとまきがい
cond: See the fossils on [[Yume 2kki:Dream Beach|Dream Beach]].

title: ゆめのなかへ
cond: Go to sleep 30 times.

title: くるくるホール
cond: Enter the octagonal hall in [[Yume 2kki:French Street|French Street]].

title: I met a ********
cond: Enter [[Yume 2kki:Violet Galaxy|Glitched Path]] in [[Yume 2kki:Violet Galaxy|Violet Galaxy]].

title: 終末
cond: Pass by the meteor along [[Yume 2kki:Highway|Highway]] (near the tunnel).

title: ハリボテの行進
cond: Enter [[Yume 2kki:Haribote Landscape|Haribote Landscape]].

title: 黄色！黄色！黄色！
cond: Enter [[Yume 2kki:Lemonade Pool|Lemonade Pool]].

title: わすれられぬ日々
cond: Enter the Ninja Circle in [[Yume 2kki:Ninja Town|Ninja Town]].

title: 原始現在
cond: Enter the [[Yume 2kki:Tribe Settlement|Tribe Settlement]].

title: ゆるまんた
cond: Enter [[Yume 2kki:Coral Shoal|Coral Shoal]] in its Golden Sunset variant.

title: 優しい海底
cond: Enter [[Yume 2kki:Gentle Sea|Gentle Sea]].

title: 青汁
cond: Interact with [[Yume 2kki:Aojiru|Aojiru]] at the [[Yume 2kki:Hospital|Hospital]].
Automatically obtained when you start ''Yume 2kki''.

title: こーひーうろつき
cond: Have a cup of coffee at the cafe in the [[Yume 2kki:Eyeball Archives|Eyeball Archives]].

title: 水鉢の夢
cond: Enter [[Yume 2kki:Goldfish Pond|Goldfish Pond]].
Interact with [[Yume 2kki:Painter-kun|Painter-kun]] in the [[Yume 2kki:Art Gallery|Art Gallery]].

title: gray hair
cond: Get the [[Yume 2kki:Effects#Wolf|Wolf]] and [[Yume 2kki:Effects#Invisible|Invisible]] effects, and meet with [[Yume 2kki:Minor Characters#Megane (Glasses Boy)|Megane]] and the boy with the red hat in [[Yume 2kki:Apartments|Apartments]].

title: 忘れじの双子山
cond: Visit the balcony in the [[Yume 2kki:Endings#Bleak Future|Bleak Future]] and obtain [[Yume 2kki:Menu Themes|menu themes]] #6 and #7.

title: 学ラン
cond: Get the [[Yume 2kki:Effects#Gakuran|Gakuran]] effect.

title: 笑顔
cond: Enter [[Yume 2kki:Guts World|Guts World]].

title: 白魔女
cond: Enter [[Yume 2kki:Serpent Ruins A|Serpent Ruins A]].

title: dice
cond: Get the [[Yume 2kki:Effects#Dice|Dice]] effect.
Enter [[Yume 2kki:Sign World|Sign World]].

title: 甘いイチゴ
cond: Reach the top of the [[Yume 2kki:Birthday Tower|Birthday Tower]].

title: リラックス
cond: Visit the north, east, south, and west sections of [[Yume 2kki:Dream Park|Dream Park]].

title: 奏でるのは
cond: Interact with the clown that plays the accordion at the [[Yume 2kki:Underwater Amusement Park|Underwater Amusement Park]].

title: あおいひと
cond: Use the [[2kki:Effects#Glasses|Glasses]] effect during the Lonely Urotsuki event in [[2kki:Underwater Amusement Park|Underwater Amusement Park]].

title: タコ
cond: Use the [[Yume 2kki:Effects#Fairy|Fairy]] effect on [[Yume 2kki:Minor Characters#Tako Otoko|Tako Otoko]] in [[Yume 2kki:Atlantis#The City|Atlantis]].

title: 暗闇
cond: Interact with [[Yume 2kki:Minor Characters#Desu-chan and Onee-chan|Desu-chan and Onee-chan]] in the [[Yume 2kki:Highway|Highway]].

title: ジェイ子
cond: Get chainsawed by the hockey mask girl in [[Yume 2kki:GALAXY Town|GALAXY Town]].

title: 檻の中
cond: Find the caged [[Yume 2kki:Chasers#Shadow Bird|Shadow Bird]] in the Halloween Forest part of the [[Yume 2kki:Cat Cemetery|Cat Cemetery]].

title: 細道に現る画伯
cond: Enter the long, dead-end hallway in [[Yume 2kki:Dark Bunker|Dark Bunker]].

title: ＮＵＬＬ－ＭＩ
cond: Look up at the ceiling of the inescapable room in [[Yume 2kki:Binary World|Binary World]]'s tower.

title: マスカレード
cond: View the [[Yume 2kki:Events#Masked Dance|Masked Dance]] event in [[Yume 2kki:Opal Archives|Opal Archives]].

title: 目玉人間
cond: Encounter the Eyeball People in the [[Yume 2kki:Spelling Room|Spelling Room]].

title: ぺんぎん
cond: Get the [[Yume 2kki:Effects#Penguin|Penguin]] effect.

title: お菓子な少女
cond: Use the [[Yume 2kki:Effects#Cake|Cake]] effect on [[Yume 2kki:Sweets Musume|Sweets Musume]] in [[Yume 2kki:Cutlery World|Cutlery World]].

title: しかく
cond: Wake up after your [[Yume 2kki:Money|money]] is at least 800夢.

title: 箱子と目薬売りと妖精
cond: Interact with Hakoko at the [[Yume 2kki:Visine World#Eye Shop|Eye Shop]].

title: うろつきとＴシャツ君
cond: Interact with the blue NPC at the end of the [[Yume 2kki:Graffiti Maze|Arrow Maze]].

title: 秘蔵の仮面
cond: Enter the Mask Room in [[Yume 2kki:Japan Town#The Hotel|Japan Town]].

title: うろ蛇の世界
cond: Enter [[Yume 2kki:Serpent Ruins A|Serpent Ruins A]].

title: 白いクジラとお味噌汁
cond: Enter [[Yume 2kki:Miso Soup Dungeon|Miso Soup Dungeon]].

title: 春の白鳥たち
cond: Enter [[Yume 2kki:Radiant Rainbow Reef|Radiant Rainbow Reef]].
Go up the ladder to [[Yume 2kki:Tapir-San's Place|Tapir-San's Place]].

title: その恨み
cond: Cut the rope at the well in [[Yume 2kki:Fairy Tale Woods|Fairy Tale Woods]] and get captured.

title: パイプオルガン
cond: Enter the [[2kki:Snowy Pipe Organ|Snowy Pipe Organ]] from the [[Yume 2kki:Dark Room|Dark Room]].

title: バネ君
cond: Get the [[Yume 2kki:Effects#Spring|Spring]] effect.
Visit [[:File:Ffw3.png|Urotsuki's Dream Scene]] in [[Yume 2kki:Flying Fish World|Flying Fish World]].

title: 退水の先に
cond: Approach the pink structure in the [[Yume 2kki:Polluted Swamp|Polluted Swamp]].

title: 窓と部屋
cond: Go through the black window in the [[Yume 2kki:Never-Ending Hallway|Never-Ending Hallway]].

title: 記憶修復
cond: Reach the file room of [[Yume 2kki:Check-Disk Nexus|Check-Disk Nexus]].

title: コンテナ
cond: Enter [[Yume 2kki:Container Forest|Container Forest]].

title: ／もっきゅっ！＼
cond: Interact with the [[Yume 2kki:Minor Characters#Monmon|Monmons]] in the [[Yume 2kki:Marijuana Goddess World|Marijuana Goddess World]] at least 6 times in one visit.

title: 徒然
cond: Get 20 effects (including the instructions).

title: ワタシとは
cond: Enter the head with the smiling creature in [[Yume 2kki:Head World|Head World]].

title: 昆虫
cond: Enter [[Yume 2kki:Events#Seishonen's Glitched Room|Seishonen's room]] when it is glitched.

title: わいんうろつき
cond: Buy a drink at the [[Yume 2kki:Cyber Bar|Cyber Bar]].

title: 恋繫り
cond: Enter [[Yume 2kki:Lovesick World#Lovesick World B|Lovesick World B]].

title: 月の上でコンばんは
cond: View the fox on the moon in [[Yume 2kki:Kitsune Residence|Kitsune Residence]].

title: 三┏（∵）┛
cond: Enter the Bowling Pin World in the [[Yume 2kki:Bowling Zone|Bowling Zone]].

title: 星屑
cond: Enter [[Yume 2kki:Space|Space]].

title: 揺蕩うくじら
cond: Enter [[Yume 2kki:Paradise|Paradise]].

title: ニゲラ
cond: Sleep for the first time.

title: 暗彩光を飛ぶ影
cond: Meet "[[Yume 2kki:Minor Characters#It Came from Behind|It Came From Behind]]" in [[Yume 2kki:Neon City|Neon City]].

title: 仮面
cond: Chainsaw [[Yume 2kki:Painter-kun|Painter-kun]] in the [[Yume 2kki:Art Gallery|Art Gallery]].

title: 館長さん宅
cond: Unlock [[Yume 2kki:Wallpapers|Wallpapers]] #64, #85, and #88.

title: たべてもいいよ？
cond: Use the [[Yume 2kki:Effects#Cake|Cake]] effect on [[Yume 2kki:Sweets Musume|Sweets Musume]] in [[Yume 2kki:Cutlery World|Cutlery World]].

title: 踊り子さん
cond: Interact with [[Yume 2kki:Minor Characters#Odorika|Odorika]] in [[Yume 2kki:Red Streetlight World|Red Streetlight World]] (you do not need the Maiko effect).

title: いでんしであう
cond: Meet the fish in the jar in Green [[Yume 2kki:Binary World|Binary World]].
Escape the bedroom after getting [[Yume 2kki:Events#Chasers in Urotsuki's Room|surrounded by chasers]] in [[Yume 2kki:Urotsuki's Dream Apartments|Urotsuki's Dream Apartments]].

title: 首吊り子
cond: Encounter [[Yume 2kki:Minor Characters#Koshukei-tan|Koshukei-tan]] in [[Yume 2kki:Graffiti Maze|Graffiti Maze]].

title: 赤ずきんとりんご
cond: Get the [[Yume 2kki:Effects#Red Riding Hood|Red Riding Hood]] effect.

title: ルーンマーク
cond: Enter [[Yume 2kki:Theatre World|Theatre World]].

title: 涙
cond: Chainsaw a stick person in the [[Yume 2kki:Penguin Game|Penguin Game]].

title: 蟲子
cond: Get the [[Yume 2kki:Effects#Insect|Insect]] effect and visit [[Yume 2kki:Garden World|Garden World]].

title: ようせい
cond: Get the [[Yume 2kki:Effects#Fairy|Fairy]] effect.

title: ほうむる
cond: Reach the White Tree and Winter Funeral subareas of [[Yume 2kki:Broken City|Broken City]].

title: ぜんまいの鶏
cond: Kill the [[Yume 2kki:Minor Characters#Angel Priest|Angel Priest]] in [[Yume 2kki:Fountain World|Fountain World]].

title: 巣食う笑顔
cond: Get a ticket from the ticket dispenser in the [[Yume 2kki:Overgrown Condominium|Overgrown Condominium]]'s arcade room.

title: よーい…ドン！
cond: Enter [[Yume 2kki:Rainbow Road|Rainbow Road]], [[Yume 2kki:Unfamiliar City|Unfamiliar City]], and [[Yume 2kki:Seaside Circuit|Seaside Circuit]].

title: 湾とビル群
cond: Visit [[Yume 2kki:Pleasure Street|Pleasure Street]] and see the wire structures on the dock.
